  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee irr Bǟlam Aug-\
stunus darrifschi/ kaß irr eekſch\
Ben-Innoma Eeleijag/ ka tee fa-\
wus Dehlus/ un fawas Meitas\
Molokam zaur Uggunt likkuschi\
eet/ fo es teem ne efmu paweh-\
lejs/ nedß man irr Sirdi nahzis/\
ka teem bij scho Negantibu dar-\
riht/ ka tee Juhdu darritu greh-\
kojam.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un uu/ tapehz fakka tas\
KUNGS/ tas Israēta Deevoß\
ta no ta Pilsfahta/ no ka juhs\
fakkat: Tas irr tam Kehnikam\
no Babeles Rohkā dohts zaur\
Sobbinu/ un zaur Baddu/ un\
zaur Mehri.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rangi/ Es fapulzinafschu\
tohs no wiſſahm Semmein/\
kurp es tohs efmu dsinnts eekſch\
mannas Duſmitbas/ un eekſch\
mannas Bahrsibas/ un eekſch\
mannas leelas Apſkaifchanas/\
un atweddifchu tohs atkat uhs\
fcho Weetu/ un likſchu tohs bes\
jamira Selimes/ un apkahrt\
Bihjaschanas dfihwoht.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee buhs man par tahm/ un eekſch teem Pilsfab-\
teem Juhda/ un eekſch to Kalnu\
Pilsfabteem/ un eekſch teem\
Pilsfabteem prett Deenas-Wid-\
dus Puft/ jo es nogreestifchu\
winno Zeetunu/ fakka tas\
KUNGS.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dohſchu teem wee-\
nadu Sirdi/ un weenadu Zeffu/\
ka tee mannis bihstubs wisu fa-\
wu Mahschu/ par winno pafchu\
Labbuma/ likhs ar winnu Behr-\
neem pehz winneem.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es darrifschu ar teem\
weenuu mubschigu Derribu / ka\
es no winneem ne griffbu at-\
kahpt/ ka es teem labba darru/\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un es dohſchu fawn Bihjascha-\
nu winneem Sirdi/ ka tee no\
mannim ne atkahpj.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es preezafschoß pahr\
teem/ winneem labba darriht/\
un es dehſtifchu tohs fchai Sem-\
mē peetizzigi/ no wiſſas mannas\
Sirds/ un no wiſſas mannas\
Dwehfeles.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS:\
Ite ka es pahr scheem Laudim\
esun weddis wiſſu fcho leelu Lau-\
numu/ ta weddischu es pahr teem\
wiſſu Labbu/ fo es pahr teem\
runnaju.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Tihrumi taps pirkti\
fchai Semmē/ no ka juhs fak-\
kat: Ta irr pohsta/ ka neweens\
Zilweks/ nedß Lohps tur irraid/\
ta irr teem Kaldeereem Rohkā\
dohta.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tihrumi taps par Man-\
du pirkti/ un Grabmatas raksti-\
tas/ un aifebgeletas/ un Leezt-\
to apteezinahs eekſch Ben-\
Jerusalenes guillamahm Wee-\
nādu Sirdi/ un weenadu Zeffu/\
ka tee mannis bihstubs wisu fa-\
wu Mahschu/ par winno pafchu\
Labbuma/ likhs ar winnu Behr-\
neem pehz winneem.\n"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
